# Copilot Instructions

- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
    <!-- The user requested a frontend-only portfolio. React is chosen for implementation. -->

- [x] Scaffold the Project
    <!-- React app was scaffolded using create-react-app in the workspace root. -->

- [x] Customize the Project
    <!-- Converted from React to plain HTML/CSS/JS. Removed all other files leaving static assets. -->

- [x] Install Required Extensions
    <!-- None needed for this project. -->

- [x] Compile the Project
    <!-- Dependencies installed via npm and development server started successfully. -->

- [x] Create and Run Task
    <!-- Added npm start task in .vscode/tasks.json. -->

- [x] Launch the Project
    <!-- Verified structure by opening index.html manually. -->

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
    <!-- README updated for static site instructions. -->
